revision.comment: fix lint
revision.text: {{Documentation|Template:Columns-start/doc}}

revision.comment: Bot: create automatic enwiki redirect
revision.text: #redirect[[:en:Template:Columns-end]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
revision.text: #redirect[[:en:Template:Columns-end]] <nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>

revision.comment: Bot: sync with enwiki
revision.text: {{Documentation|Template:Columns-start/doc}}

revision.comment: Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
revision.text: {{Documentation|Template:Columns-start/doc}} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]

revision.comment: Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
revision.text: {{Documentation|Template:Columns-start/doc}} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]

revision.comment: Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
revision.text: {{Documentation|Template:Columns-start/doc}} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text: {{Documentation|Template:Columns-start/doc}} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text: {{Documentation|Template:Columns-start/doc}} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text: {{Documentation|Template:Columns-start/doc}} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Templates]]
